- **`scripts/start.py`** — creates a GitHub issue with `[feat]` prefix + `enhancement` label, parses the issue number from the URL, builds a `feature/issue-<N>-<slug>` branch name, checks it out and pushes.
- **`scripts/run.py`** — runs the 4 stages in order (implement → review → PR → merge), passes stdout/stderr through, exits on first failure.
- **`scripts/execute.py`** — added `auto_commit()` and wired it into `execute_phase()` right after AC commands pass, before writing `completed_at`.
- **`CLAUDE.md`** — two new rows added to the Current Commands table.
